elements.original_description: A large, dark gray cloud shaped like a looming monster hovers in the center of a pure white background. Its jagged edges and menacing expression convey fear. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a large, dark gray cloud shaped like a looming monster with jagged edges and a menacing expression, centered on a pure white background, conveying an atmosphere of intense fear. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
